summary: WIN-067 detail_evidence is reframed from an asserted attribution ('the dome model\'s stated physics links gravity to the aetheric pressure gradient driven by column height H(r)') to an explicit IF-THEN conditional grounded in two verbatim dome raw-text quotations: (a) raw-text/08-live-power.txt line 69 (Domain 4 ECM mechanism field) 'Dielectric pressure with aetheric density variation' as the gravity mechanism; (b) raw-text/02-wins.txt line 31 'The disc edge creates an aetheric pressure gradient. That gradient drives both the anomalous geomagnetic field minimum (SAA) and the anomalous atmospheric pressure pattern (Roaring 40s)' as the column-height linkage. The new block also surfaces the structural-inference leg: Domain 4's λ_g = 8,619 km is identical to H(r)'s exponential decay constant 8,619 km (raw-text/08-live-power.txt line 70 vs raw-text/05-model.txt line 16). This closes c6 hole H4 — the dome cannot deny the antecedents (they are quoted verbatim from its own pages) and the dilemma now has both horns explicit: deny the IF-THEN and the dome has no dome-specific gravity mechanism at all, only the WGS84-clone Domain 4 (which already self-falsifies at the rim by 4.8× per detail_extra paragraph iii). EXP-215 Patch 4 contains the exact replacement HTML and the precise sentence-level locator the decider needs.
